title: Politician who investigated spyware abuses had his phone hacked with Pegasus spyware
snippet: A government customer of NSO Group used the company's Pegasus spyware to hack into the phone of a European politician, who at the time was serving on an EU committee tasked with investigating the spyware industry.

title: Last chance to apply — Startup Battlefield Australia applications close July 6
snippet: If you're going to apply for Startup Battlefield Australia, now is the time. Applications close July 6, and once the deadline passes, the opportunity is gone.
